description: Stable assistant-facing build response contracts for overlay and backend calls.

responseGuidance.contractRule: Use buildRequests entries as the primary assistant response source for build questions.
responseGuidance.disclaimer: Generated builds are starter skeletons. Capacity, polarities, arcanes, rivens, helminth, shards, and exact enemy level are intentionally outside this contract.
responseGuidance.fallbackRule: If no buildRequest matches the player query, fall back to combatRecommendations and missingTargets.
